description: Composite a paper texture over an animation to create a traditional look. Open the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and import the texture file '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/parchment_texture.jpg'. Composite the texture over the animation using a 'Multiply' blending mode so the character appears drawn on the paper, ensuring the texture covers the entire 1920x1080 camera frame. Render frames 1-10 as PNG files to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/textured_composite/'.
